title: API integration
excerpt: We’re looking for a team to help with the integration of Monday.com and our com portal (www.mxconnect.com).  We’re likely looking for a similar integration for another site in the near future.

posts.author: Jamgolfer (Jamie Martin)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re looking for a team to help with the integration of Monday.com and our com portal (www.mxconnect.com). We’re likely looking for a similar integration for another site in the near future.

posts.author: Alex.Robinson (Alex Robinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Jamgolfer
Welcome to the community!
I work for JT’s Cloud which specialises in customer integrations with monday.com and won APAC Partner of the Year.

Would love to meet you and understand your requirements around this integration further, please feel free to book in a time via below link:
Book Meeting Here

Kind regards,
Alex Robinson
JT’s Cloud
